name: The North Country Savings Bank
description_short: Community-focused mutual bank serving North Country NY since 1909, offering checking, savings, mortgages, personal loans, and construction financing across 8 locations.
description_long:
North Country Savings Bank is a mutual bank that has operated in the North Country region of New York for over 100 years, establishing itself as a community-centered financial institution. The bank was founded in 1909 and has survived multiple economic crises including world wars, pandemics, and recessions while maintaining its commitment to local service. Under the leadership of President and CEO R. Brian Coakley, the institution operates with core values centered on Integrity, Quality Service, Mutuality, and Community.

The bank offers a comprehensive range of consumer banking services including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs) with competitive rates, personal loans, mortgage financing, and specialized construction loans. They provide online and mobile banking capabilities, ATM access across multiple locations, and eStatement options. Their loan offerings specifically include mortgages for first-time homebuyers, personal loans for various purposes, and construction loans with flexibility for do-it-yourself builders. They also offer a Relationship CD product advertised at 3.56% APY for customers who maintain qualifying accounts.

What distinguishes North Country Savings Bank is its emphasis on personalized service through dedicated Loan Originators and relationship bankers who claim to consider factors beyond credit scores when evaluating applications. The bank explicitly markets its willingness to work with applicants who have poor credit histories. As a mutual bank (rather than shareholder-owned), they maintain a community-driven operational model. They operate 8 branch locations across the North Country region including Canton, Potsdam, Ogdensburg, Malone, Massena, Saranac Lake, Plattsburgh, and Tupper Lake. Their routing number is 221371123.

However, prospective customers should note this is a regional bank with limited geographic reach, serving primarily St. Lawrence County and surrounding North Country areas. Specific details about account fees, minimum balances, full rate structures, and underwriting standards are not available on their website. While they advertise willingness to work with poor credit applicants, no independent verification of approval rates or actual lending practices is provided. The bank's digital banking capabilities appear basic compared to national institutions. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Certificates of Deposit (CDs) including Relationship CD products
Mortgage lending and home purchase financing
Construction loans for DIY and contractor-built projects
Online banking and digital account management
pros: Over 100 years of continuous operation and community presence in North Country NY
8 branch locations across the region provides geographic convenience for local residents
Mutual bank structure means profits are reinvested rather than distributed to shareholders
Explicitly markets willingness to work with first-time homebuyers and applicants with poor credit
Offers specialized construction loans that accept do-it-yourself builders without requiring contractors
Dedicated Loan Originators who claim to evaluate applications beyond credit score metrics
Relationship CD product with competitive 3.56% APY for qualifying customers
cons: Limited geographic service area restricted to North Country NY region; not accessible to most US consumers
Website lacks specific details on account fees, minimum balance requirements, and full interest rate schedules
No published lending approval rates or third-party verification of willingness to work with poor credit applicants
Digital/online banking features appear limited compared to national and neobank competitors
No information provided about credit counseling, financial planning services, or specific underwriting criteria
best_for: North Country NY residents seeking local relationship banking and community-focused service
First-time homebuyers in the region who need personalized mortgage guidance
DIY construction project owners needing construction financing without contractor requirements
Local business owners and community members who value mutual bank ownership structure
diagnosis: North Country Savings Bank is best suited for residents of the North Country NY region (Canton, Potsdam, Ogdensburg, Malone, Massena, Saranac Lake, Plattsburgh, Tupper Lake areas) who value community banking relationships and personalized service over digital convenience. The main caveat is that this is a small regional mutual bank with limited geographic reach; it is not accessible to most US consumers and offers no online account opening for non-local applicants.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
